text: An incredible book that makes you think about the infinite paths life could take. Highly recommended for anyone feeling stuck.
This book made me reconsider every 'what if' moment in my life. Matt Haig has a gift for making the profound feel accessible.
A beautifully written and thoughtful novel. The concept is creative and the execution is mostly wonderful, though it felt slightly predictable toward the end.
Andy Weir has done it again! The science is fascinating and the humor is perfectly timed. Rocky is the best character in fiction.
Circe is a masterpiece of feminist retelling. Madeline Miller brings Greek mythology to life in the most human way possible.
